headlines: Need a quick clarification before I continue

articles.title: Clarify timeframe
articles.summary: I ran web searches but couldn’t find clear, authoritative headlines from major crypto outlets strictly within the last 24 hours (Mar 28–29, 2026). Do you want me to: (A) expand the window to the last 48–72 hours, or (B) proceed using market-data posts and community sources (CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, Reddit threads, exchange notices) for the past 24 hours?
